movements.title: Bank movements
movements.subtitle: Audit movements for direct notification accounts and re-send the webhook when needed.
movements.emptyNoAccounts: You don't have any direct notification accounts. Set an account to direct notification to see its movements here.
movements.emptyWrongMode: Your account operates in Reconciliation mode. Bank movements are only available in Direct notification mode. Change the mode from Settings to see them.
movements.emptyTableDesc: Once the first movement is detected in this account, it will appear here.
movements.renotifyTitle: Are you sure you want to re-notify?
movements.renotifyDesc: This will re-send the webhook for this movement to the external system.
